post.description:
Pauses the running PRD flow and saves current progress to MongoDB. The flow can be resumed later via POST /flow/prd/resume.

- If the run is in 'awaiting_approval', the pause takes effect immediately.
- If the run is in 'running', a pause flag is set and the flow will pause at the next approval checkpoint.

**Error recovery**: if the flow encounters an error (LLM timeout, billing issue, etc.), it is automatically paused with status 'paused' — the run is never marked 'failed', so it can always be resumed.

Equivalent to the CLI pause action.

409.description: Run cannot be paused in its current state.

503.description: LLM / OpenAI service unavailable (LLM_ERROR or BILLING_ERROR). The affected flow run is automatically paused.
